title: The MacBook Air config you should actually buy just got cheaper: Apple's 'best ultraportable' with an M5 chip, 16GB RAM, and a 512GB SSD is $100 off at Best Buy
summary: The 10-core CPU, 8-core GPU, and 16GB of memory provide plenty of performance for work, creative projects, and everyday computing, while the upgraded 512GB SSD delivers faster storage than previous entry-level MacBook Air models, helping applications launch quickly and improving file transfers.
